PUBLI.C GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel & Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi. the 3rd August. 1989 G.S,R. 638 (E) .-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-seaton 0) of section 1 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1!)85). thl' Cen- tral Government hereby appoints the 3rd day of August. 1!)8!), as th", date on which the provisions of the Act. in so for as they relate to the Adminislrativc Tribunal for the State of Arunachal Pradesh shall come into force.
